title: Directionless Wanderer Origin
description: You lack any sense of direction. To such a point its anomalous.
body:
A very simple origin made for a friend. You lack any sense of direction. To such a point its anomalous.

# Anomalous Disaperance
You can press primary to randomly teleport to anywhere in 10,000 blocks.

# Group Anomalous Disaperance
You can press secondary to randomly teleport to anywhere in 10,000 blocks, together with anyone within 8 blocks of you.

# Bad Organization
You can't seem to find compasses or maps once you lose sight of them.
